Localization.Description: Failed attempts to log in are detected

EventDescriptions.EventDescription: Host {event_src.host} detected multiple failed attempts of the user {subject.account.domain}\{subject.account.name} from host {src.host} to log in
An unsuccessful attempt to log in to the system on host {event_src.host} from host {src.host} is detected
An unsuccessful attempt to log in to the system on host {event_src.host} as the user {subject.account.name} is detected
The user {subject.account.name} from host {src.host} failed to log in to the system on host {event_src.host}
Multiple unsuccessful login attempts are detected on host {event_src.host}
